layout-appshell.import:
import { AppShell } from "web";
import { Typography } from "@mui/material";

stories.name: Default
stories.snippet:
const Default = () => <OpStatusBreakdown
    counts={{ pending: 3, ready: 23, running: 4, succeeded: 808, failed: 12, canceled: 0 }} />;

stories.name: All Succeeded
stories.snippet:
const AllSucceeded = () => <OpStatusBreakdown
    counts={{ pending: 0, ready: 0, running: 0, succeeded: 500, failed: 0, canceled: 0 }} />;

stories.name: Mostly Pending
stories.snippet:
const MostlyPending = () => <OpStatusBreakdown
    counts={{ pending: 200, ready: 15, running: 3, succeeded: 12, failed: 0, canceled: 0 }} />;

stories.name: Has Failures
stories.snippet:
const HasFailures = () => <OpStatusBreakdown
    counts={{ pending: 0, ready: 2, running: 1, succeeded: 40, failed: 15, canceled: 0 }} />;

stories.name: Small Workflow
stories.snippet:
const SmallWorkflow = () => <OpStatusBreakdown
    counts={{ pending: 0, ready: 0, running: 1, succeeded: 3, failed: 0, canceled: 0 }} />;

stories.name: Default
stories.snippet:
const Default = () => <QueueHealthPreview
    queues={[
      createQueueStatus({ queue: 'site:hn:http', inFlight: 2, maxInFlight: 4 }),
      createQueueStatus({ queue: 'site:hn:js', inFlight: 1, maxInFlight: 4 }),
      createQueueStatus({ site: 'slashdot', queue: 'site:sd:http', inFlight: 0, maxInFlight: 4 }),
      createQueueStatus({ site: 'nereval', queue: 'site:nv:js', inFlight: 0, maxInFlight: 1 }),
    ]} />;
